subcodes.first_line: Say: O people of Bahá! Ye are the dawning-places of triumph in the kingdom of creation. Stand ye firm in the Cause of your Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا اهل البهاء انتم مطالع النصر فی ملکوت الانشاء ان استقیموا علی امر ربکم
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
